idea_ref: [T1.GATE] Pseudo-label leak audit — verify exp_0072's 0.970 ST2 is real
hypothesis: exp_0072 trains with pseudo_v001_st2 (test-set entries pseudo-labeled by exp_0065). Check: (1) no text overlap between pseudo training entries and dev split, (2) cosine similarity distribution between dev and pseudo examples, (3) token-level Jaccard overlap. If dev/pseudo overlap is high, 0.970 may be partly leaked.
